overall.description: A third-person perspective journey through a rocky canyon in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The character walks along a dirt path, crosses a shallow river, and ascends through a narrow rocky gorge lined with wooden power poles before emerging into an open grassy meadow with pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon trail with steep walls

events.description: rider on horseback gallops past from center to right, overtaking the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the narrow canyon

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past along the trail

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock
steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation
winding dirt trail through the canyon floor

weathered wooden utility pole with crossbars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. The camera walks forward along a dirt path as a rider on horseback suddenly gallops past from the center to the right. Sparse trees line the canyon edges and a wooden power pole is visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching the shallow river, ground surface transitions to water
entering the shallow creek and wading through the water

agents.ego_description: walking through the canyon and entering the shallow river water

entered.detail: shallow clear water flowing through the canyon
lush green trees growing along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the narrowing canyon, approaching a shallow river. The ground transitions from dirt to water as the character wades through the creek. Lush trees line the riverbanks and the canyon walls draw closer on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon ascent with utility poles

events.description: exiting the water onto the rocky shore and beginning the ascent
beginning steep climb up the winding canyon trail

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky trail alongside wooden power poles

entered.detail: large boulders and rock debris along the trail
series of weathered utility poles with wires stretching along the canyon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the character begins a steep ascent up a rocky trail. The canyon walls loom close on both sides, and a series of wooden power poles with overhead wires line the path. The ground is uneven with scattered rocks and boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow with pine trees

events.description: canyon walls open up to reveal wide grassy hills and meadow

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland with scattered pine trees following the power lines

entered.detail: rolling green grass-covered hills replacing rocky cliffs
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the meadow
large rocky mountain formation visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up into a wide grassy meadow with rolling hills. The rocky walls give way to green grass and scattered pine trees. Wooden power poles continue to line the path, and distant mountains become visible on the horizon as the character walks through the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit meadow. It begins on a dirt path between steep cliff walls as a rider on horseback gallops past, moving toward a distant wooden power pole. As the path narrows, the terrain transitions from dry earth to a shallow creek, with the camera wading through water lined by lush riverbank trees. The scene then shifts to a steep ascent up an uneven rocky trail where the canyon walls loom close and a series of power poles with overhead wires guide the way. Finally, the rocky enclosure gives way to a wide grassy meadow with rolling hills and scattered pine trees, revealing distant mountains on the horizon.
